Analysis finds bias in jury picks

Jennifer LaFleur January February 2006
Data & DatabasesDemographics & Census

A statistical analysis of jury selection in Dallas County reveals continued racial bias in juror exclusions, highlighting slow progress since a 1986 exposé.

The Count of San Francisco

Judy Miller March 1991
Data & DatabasesJournalism & NewsroomDemographics & Census

The San Francisco Chronicle achieved detailed reports on the 1990 census data through advanced preparation and computer-assisted techniques, despite unexpected challenges.
